S.FORM: Didier Burkhalter 4 a bulad 17 a demiad, Didier Burkhalter, u misingkiway. 1960 a mihcaan nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtungÁłĹÁĶĪ) nu Switzerland ayza sa ci Didier Burkhalter, micakat a demiad sa i 2012 a mihcaan 1 a bulad 1 a demiad.
S.PHON: didi…ôr burkńßar~…ĺt…ôr * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, didi…ôr burkńßar~…ĺt…ôr, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶aan nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč**) nu switz…ôrr~…ĺand ajza sa ¶i didi…ôr burkńßar~…ĺt…ôr, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad.
